build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../frontend/app-gui && npm run build && cd ../../ && cargo build --release --bin agent --bin ankayma-helper && cp target/release/agent target/release/agent-aarch64-apple-darwin && rustup target add x86_64-apple-darwin && cargo build --release --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bin agent && cp target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/agent target/release/agent-x86_64-apple-darwin && lipo -create -output target/release/agent-universal-apple-darwin target/release/agent-x86_64-apple-darwin target/release/agent-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --options runtime --timestamp --sign "$APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY" target/release/ankayma-helper

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'
